title: Tag Claude in, right where you already work
summary: Anthropic launched Claude Tag, a feature allowing users to invoke Claude directly within Slack channels. The tool reads channel context, integrates with organizational tools, and can persist on tasks over multiple days, requiring user input only when needed.
writeup: The video covers Claude Tag, an Anthropic feature that lets users invoke Claude directly inside Slack channels. It reads channel context and integrates with organizational tools, which keeps the assistant working within existing team workflows rather than a separate interface. The notable capability is persistence: Claude can stay on a task across multiple days, surfacing requests for user input only when needed.
